---
title: "Puri Phakmongkol"
about:
  id: about-puri
  template: jolla
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
      # Variables don't work here.
    - icon: facebook
      text: puri.in.th
      href: https://fb.com/purixinth
    - icon: twitter
      text: "@puriphk"
      href: https://twitter.com/puriphk
    - icon: instagram
      text: "@puriphk"
      href: https://instagram.com/puriphk
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/suakow
    - icon: clipboard-data
      text: Kaggle
      href: https://www.kaggle.com/suakao
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:me@puri.in.th
---

This is my new website. I have to finish this before travelling abroad !
